title: Figures Don't Lie
writer: Ethel Doherty, Grover Jones, Louise Long
actors: Esther Ralston, Richard Arlen, Ford Sterling
plot: Janet Wells is the secretary to boss "Howdy" Jones, but finds it increasingly problematic to get any work done because of her boss' insanely jealous wife, who just "knows" that the beautiful Janet is having an affair with her husb...
